title: ardisia pubicalyx var. collinsiae
intro: Ardisia pubicalyx var. collinsiae, also known as a variety of the Ardisia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ardisia pubicalyx var. collinsiae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, or applied topically as a paste or salve.
